title: cephaelis balansae
intro: Cephaelis balansae, also known as Balansa's tea plant or Chinese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Cephaelis balansae include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-fever agent. Cephaelis balansae is often prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water or as a tincture, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
